h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font, centered at the top of the page with significant white space above and below.

h2.visual_description: Standard weight serif font, left-aligned, used for front matter sections and chapter titles within the list. Chapter titles are preceded by a number and a period.

h3.visual_description: Italicized serif font within the list, used for specific chapter titles that are in a foreign language or require emphasis.

visual_matchers.pattern: Text followed by a series of dots (leader dots) and a right-aligned number.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Table of Contents entry linking a title to a page number.

visual_matchers.pattern: Roman numerals (ix, xi, xv) at the end of leader dots.
Arabic numerals (1, 5, 13...) at the end of leader dots.

markdown_grammar.table_style: markdown (for simple lists with leader dots, represent as a list or a two-column table)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page numbers are integrated into the content flow (right-aligned in TOC); no running headers or footers visible on this specific page.
